facebook.caption: Tourists walk past this every day. Locals shop here every morning. The day market on 49 Đường Ngô Quyền is where Phu Quoc actually shops. Fresh produce, local snacks, things you won't find in any resort gift shop. Skip the tourist supermarkets. This is the real supply run. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch what locals throw in their baskets at 49 Đường Ngô Quyền. Fresh, cheap, zero tourist markup. This is the Phu Quoc market the resorts don't mention.
